title: Power Bestowal
wikitext:
[[File:Neo_Queen_Serenity_bestow_Power_(2).jpg|thumb|400px|Neo Queen Serenity bestows new powers to Sailor Moon and all the other Sailor Senshi.]]

==Summary==
'''Power Bestowal''' is the ability to grant other beings or objects new abilities or new forms to their abilities.

Note that just because a character can grant a power to another, does not mean that they can grant that same power to themselves. It must be stated that said ability can grant the user greater power as well.

==Users==
*[[Stand Arrow|The Stand Arrow]] ([[JoJo's Bizarre Adventure]])
*[[Children of the Forest]] ([[Game of Thrones]])
*[[Kyubey]] ([[Puella Magi Verse|Puella Magi Madoka Magica]])
*[[AM (I Have No Mouth, and I Must Scream)|AM]] ([[I Have No Mouth, and I Must Scream]])
*[[Animus (Metroid)|Animus]] ([[Metroid (Verse)|Metroid]])
*[[Q (Star Trek)|Q]] ([[Star Trek]])
